subject: Tax Invoice INV-2026-0008 – Adviser Platform & Compliance Services (May 2026)
preview: Attached is your consolidated May tax invoice covering AdviserLogic platform subscriptions and compliance services.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached tax invoice #INV-2026-0008 covering AdviserLogic platform subscriptions and Licensee Solutions compliance services for the May 2026 billing period.

Customer Number: LS-882914
Contract Number: LS-AU-2026-114
Subtotal: AUD 25,440.00
GST (10%): AUD 2,544.00
Total Amount Due: AUD 27,984.00
Due Date: June 21, 2026
Payment Terms: Net 30

Please quote both contract and invoice number in your payment advice. For remittance support, contact remittance@licenseesolutions.com.au.

Regards,
Licensee Solutions Pty Ltd
Accounts Receivable
